posts.raw_content:
Kiddos, this is your generation's IQ test.

You're 18, finally out of kid prison. You survived without getting shot or raped by a progressive. Congratulations. 

But Chances are you were taught less than nothing by your highschool.


Whats the college  recruiter's pitch? 

Daddy Warbucks is going to put 150k in your hands to party. 


You can Hangout with your buddies for six years, drink, rut like a pig, don't worry about starting your career150k in the red.


It's a hard pitch to beat. Plus it's hard to get anyone with remorse to admit buying and financing non productive college was a mistake.


Fine. 


You will also need a valuable skill, a craft that you can employ to solve problems for others, and that 150k won't buy you one.


Consider 6 years, 150k, 25 alcohol pounds, 105 partners, a dozen morning after pills, and five high dose antibiotic shots from now,


when you wear their pointy hat and your fake and gay professors certify that you have reached the expert level of fake and gay,


what problems will you be able to solve for anyone? Including yourself?


Now you've lived like an adolescent for 2,4,6,8+ years and you're saddled with a debt that's very difficult to bankrupt. They got you. 


What're the alternatives? Anything but that...


There are of course other ways. Evil ways. The Hidden Forbidden Ways of Free Enterprise. 


Consider investing your remaining youth in developing your trade. How?


Ask yourself "What problems do I like solving?"


Then make a list of ten. If it was hard-good. Then come up with ten more. Then ten more. Get to a hundred. 


You may start to notice a trend and it probably intersects with something you're good at. 


Once you get a better understanding of your inclination, go find ten someones doing it as a trade, then find ten more, observe, learn, work you're ass off 


The handoff from experienced skilled tradesmen to inexperienced unskilled apprentice is ancient and productive.


Suppose you get on somewhere. Now every single day you're getting better and stronger and wealthier. 


You're living the cutting edge of your profession while your college peers are practicing being fake and gay. 


Look, if you really want a liberal arts education, the books are cheap, highlighters are cheap, index cards are cheap- 18 bucks per month will buy you a private fake and gay AI professor. 

While you figure it out, learn about the country your progressive teachers hid from you.

No Charge-No Sponsors- Written as a matter of civic duty-

posts.content:
Kiddos, this is your generation's IQ test.

You're 18, finally out of kid prison. You survived without getting shot or raped by a progressive. Congratulations.

But Chances are you were taught less than nothing by your highschool.

Whats the college recruiter's pitch?

Daddy Warbucks is going to put 150k in your hands to party.

You can Hangout with your buddies for six years, drink, rut like a pig, don't worry about starting your career150k in the red.

It's a hard pitch to beat. Plus it's hard to get anyone with remorse to admit buying and financing non productive college was a mistake.

Fine.

You will also need a valuable skill, a craft that you can employ to solve problems for others, and that 150k won't buy you one.

Consider 6 years, 150k, 25 alcohol pounds, 105 partners, a dozen morning after pills, and five high dose antibiotic shots from now,

when you wear their pointy hat and your fake and gay professors certify that you have reached the expert level of fake and gay,

what problems will you be able to solve for anyone? Including yourself?

Now you've lived like an adolescent for 2,4,6,8+ years and you're saddled with a debt that's very difficult to bankrupt. They got you.

What're the alternatives? Anything but that...

There are of course other ways. Evil ways. The Hidden Forbidden Ways of Free Enterprise.

Consider investing your remaining youth in developing your trade. How?

Ask yourself "What problems do I like solving?"

Then make a list of ten. If it was hard-good. Then come up with ten more. Then ten more. Get to a hundred.

You may start to notice a trend and it probably intersects with something you're good at.

Once you get a better understanding of your inclination, go find ten someones doing it as a trade, then find ten more, observe, learn, work you're ass off

The handoff from experienced skilled tradesmen to inexperienced unskilled apprentice is ancient and productive.

Suppose you get on somewhere. Now every single day you're getting better and stronger and wealthier.

You're living the cutting edge of your profession while your college peers are practicing being fake and gay.
